name: youtube-video-recommender
description: Chrome extension for personalized YouTube video recommendations

scripts.extension:build: cd extension && npm run build && cd ..
scripts.extension:build:dev: cd extension && npm run build:dev && cd ..
scripts.backend:dev: cd backend && npm run dev && cd ..
scripts.backend:build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ..
scripts.test: npm run extension:test && npm run backend:test
scripts.extension:test: cd extension && npm run test && cd ..
scripts.backend:test: cd backend && npm run test && cd ..
scripts.lint: npm run extension:lint && npm run backend:lint
